name: Gray Forrester
ticker: GRAY FORRESTER - PORTFOLIO OF IDEAS, PROJECTS & OTHER ODDS AND ENDS - EST. 2026

home.heroLede: Hi there, I'm Gray. This is a place for me to showcase what I've built at school, what I've built at work, what I've built in-between school and work, and what I've built with my new pal Claude.

body: Currently, I’m a product owner and forward-deployed engineer at Deloitte's ConvergeHealth, the software arm that ships software with a focus on HealthTech. There, I’m helping build an agentic platform: AI agents doing real work in a domain where stability is paramount. The job is half product owner, half solutioning.

school.lede: Learning the theory underpinning computer science and AI in general. This helps me underneath what truly goes into effective agents: reward signals, control loops, state and search. Due to the nature of the OMSCS program and their honor-code, source code has to stay private, but can be be shared and discussed on request.

play.stripRight: LIVE AND BUILT WITH CLAUDE CODE
play.lede: After-hours SaaS apps, built end-to-end with Claude Code and live in production. Primarily built for fun and to understand the process of launching SaaS apps in 2026.

contact.heroLede: Drop me a line! Recruiters, collaborators, people with strong opinions about who the greatest songwriter of all time is - anyone!
